name: libcrypt-urandom-perl
title: libcrypt-urandom-perl
summary: module that provides non blocking randomness
description:
module that provides non blocking randomness
Crypt::Urandom is intended to provide an interface to the strongest available
source of non-blocking randomness on the current platform.
.
Platforms currently supported are anything supporting /dev/urandom.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libcrypt-urandom-perl because module that provides non blocking randomness.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libcrypt-urandom-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libcrypt-urandom-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libcrypt-urandom-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
